requirement_topic.en: Hazardous Substances — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Sri Lanka
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质——斯里兰卡无横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質——斯里蘭卡無橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Sri Lanka does not have an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime restricting specified hazardous substances (lead, mercury, cadmium, hexavalent chromium, PBB, PBDE, and the four phthalates) in electrical and electronic equipment as a condition of market access. There is no Sri Lankan equivalent of Directive 2011/65/EU that, by itself, bars an LED luminaire from the market based on homogeneous-material substance concentrations or that requires a RoHS Declaration of Conformity. Substance control, where it applies, is addressed through general chemicals, hazardous-waste, and environmental legislation administered by the Central Environmental Authority (CEA) under the National Environmental Act, plus any substance-specific provisions inside an adopted SLS / IEC product standard (for example, limits on mercury content in certain lamp types within the relevant IEC lamp standard). Manufacturers should not assume a horizontal RoHS test certificate is required for SLSI certification, but should confirm any lamp-type-specific substance limits (e.g., mercury in non-LED or mixed-technology lamps) with SLSI.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡没有欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，即不以电气电子设备中特定有害物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE 及四项邻苯二甲酸酯）含量作为市场准入条件加以限制。斯里兰卡不存在相当于指令 2011/65/EU 的制度——其本身不会基于均质材料物质浓度禁止 LED 灯具进入市场，也不要求 RoHS 符合性声明。物质管控在适用时，通过环境中央局（CEA）依据《国家环境法》管理的一般化学品、危险废物及环境法规处理，并辅以采用的 SLS / IEC 产品标准内的任何物质特定条款（例如相关 IEC 灯标准对某些灯型汞含量的限制）。制造商不应假设 SLSI 认证须要横向 RoHS 检测证书，但应就任何灯型特定物质限值（如非 LED 或混合技术灯具的汞）向 SLSI 确认。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，即不以電氣電子設備中特定有害物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE 及四項鄰苯二甲酸酯）含量作為市場准入條件加以限制。斯里蘭卡不存在相當於指令 2011/65/EU 的制度——其本身不會基於均質材料物質濃度禁止 LED 燈具進入市場，也不要求 RoHS 符合性聲明。物質管控在適用時，通過環境中央局（CEA）依據《國家環境法》管理的一般化學品、危險廢物及環境法規處理，並輔以採用的 SLS / IEC 產品標準內的任何物質特定條款（例如相關 IEC 燈標準對某些燈型汞含量的限制）。製造商不應假設 SLSI 認證須要橫向 RoHS 檢測證書，但應就任何燈型特定物質限值（如非 LED 或混合技術燈具的汞）向 SLSI 確認。

standards_or_laws: No Sri Lankan horizontal RoHS regulation equivalent to EU Directive 2011/65/EU
National Environmental Act (Central Environmental Authority, CEA) — general chemicals / hazardous-substance and waste framework
Substance-specific limits inside adopted SLS / IEC lamp product standards where applicable (e.g., mercury limits in relevant IEC lamp standards)

summary.en: China operates China RoHS: GB/T 26572-2011 (concentration limits for restricted substances in EEE) covers the original six RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same thresholds as EU RoHS, and SJ/T 11364-2014 (China RoHS 2 marking) requires a hazardous-substance disclosure label (orange = contains above threshold / green = below) on EEE sold in China. China RoHS focuses on disclosure marking rather than acting as a market-access bar based on substance content.
summary.zh: 中国实施中国 RoHS：GB/T 26572-2011（电子电气产品限用物质限量要求）涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），阈值与欧盟 RoHS 相同；SJ/T 11364-2014（中国 RoHS 2 标识）要求在华销售 EEE 加贴有害物质披露标识（橙色=超限值含有 / 绿色=低于限值）。中国 RoHS 侧重披露标识，而非基于物质含量的市场准入门槛。
summary.zht: 中國實施中國 RoHS：GB/T 26572-2011（電子電氣產品限用物質限量要求）涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），閾值與歐盟 RoHS 相同；SJ/T 11364-2014（中國 RoHS 2 標識）要求在華銷售 EEE 加貼有害物質披露標識（橙色=超限值含有 / 綠色=低於限值）。中國 RoHS 側重披露標識，而非基於物質含量的市場准入門檻。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572-2011 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR — covers original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — Marking for the restricted use of hazardous substances in electronic and electrical products (China RoHS 2 disclosure label)

gap.en: The structural position is the reverse of the EU comparison: here it is China that has a defined RoHS instrument (China RoHS disclosure marking under GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364), while Sri Lanka has no horizontal RoHS regime at all. For a Chinese exporter this means: (1) there is no Sri Lankan RoHS test certificate or RoHS DoC to obtain as a market-access condition; (2) the China RoHS disclosure label is a Chinese-market requirement and is not required by SLSI; (3) substance control in Sri Lanka, where relevant, comes from general environmental law (CEA / National Environmental Act) and from any substance-specific clause inside the adopted SLS / IEC lamp standard, not from a horizontal RoHS list. The practical action is to confirm with SLSI whether any lamp-type substance limit (such as mercury in mixed-technology lamps) applies and to retain material/substance documentation that may be requested by the importer or authorities; do not assume an EU-style 10-substance RoHS test is required.
gap.zh: 结构上与欧盟对比相反：此处是中国设有明确的 RoHS 工具（GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364 下的中国 RoHS 披露标识），而斯里兰卡完全没有横向 RoHS 制度。对中国出口商而言：（1）斯里兰卡没有作为市场准入条件须取得的 RoHS 检测证书或 RoHS 符合性声明；（2）中国 RoHS 披露标识为中国市场要求，SLSI 不要求；（3）斯里兰卡的物质管控（在相关时）来自一般环境法（CEA / 国家环境法）及采用的 SLS / IEC 灯标准内的任何物质特定条款，而非横向 RoHS 清单。实际行动是向 SLSI 确认是否适用任何灯型物质限值（如混合技术灯具的汞），并保留进口商或主管机构可能索取的材料/物质文件；不应假设须要欧盟式 10 项物质 RoHS 检测。
gap.zht: 結構上與歐盟對比相反：此處是中國設有明確的 RoHS 工具（GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364 下的中國 RoHS 披露標識），而斯里蘭卡完全沒有橫向 RoHS 制度。對中國出口商而言：（1）斯里蘭卡沒有作為市場准入條件須取得的 RoHS 檢測證書或 RoHS 符合性聲明；（2）中國 RoHS 披露標識為中國市場要求，SLSI 不要求；（3）斯里蘭卡的物質管控（在相關時）來自一般環境法（CEA / 國家環境法）及採用的 SLS / IEC 燈標準內的任何物質特定條款，而非橫向 RoHS 清單。實際行動是向 SLSI 確認是否適用任何燈型物質限值（如混合技術燈具的汞），並保留進口商或主管機構可能索取的材料/物質文件；不應假設須要歐盟式 10 項物質 RoHS 檢測。

mandatory_status.target: No horizontal RoHS regime — Sri Lanka has no EU-style RoHS market-access restriction or RoHS DoC requirement for LED luminaires; substance control, where it applies, derives from general environmental law (CEA) and substance-specific clauses in the adopted SLS / IEC lamp standard. Confirm any lamp-type limit with SLSI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure) — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label required under SJ/T 11364-2014; GB/T 26572 covers 6 original substances

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime — there is no Sri Lankan RoHS substance-restriction test or RoHS DoC as a market-access condition for LED luminaires. China, by contrast, operates China RoHS disclosure marking (GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364), which is a China-market requirement not needed for SLSI. Substance control in Sri Lanka, where relevant, comes from general environmental law (CEA / National Environmental Act) and any substance clause inside the adopted SLS / IEC lamp standard. Confirm any lamp-type substance limit with SLSI; do not assume an EU-equivalent 10-substance RoHS test is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡没有欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度——LED 灯具不存在作为市场准入条件的斯里兰卡 RoHS 物质限制检测或 RoHS 符合性声明。相比之下，中国实施中国 RoHS 披露标识（GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364），属中国市场要求，SLSI 不须要。斯里兰卡的物质管控（在相关时）来自一般环境法（CEA / 国家环境法）及采用的 SLS / IEC 灯标准内的任何物质条款。请就任何灯型物质限值向 SLSI 确认；不应假设须要欧盟等效的 10 项物质 RoHS 检测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度——LED 燈具不存在作為市場准入條件的斯里蘭卡 RoHS 物質限制檢測或 RoHS 符合性聲明。相比之下，中國實施中國 RoHS 披露標識（GB/T 26572 / SJ/T 11364），屬中國市場要求，SLSI 不須要。斯里蘭卡的物質管控（在相關時）來自一般環境法（CEA / 國家環境法）及採用的 SLS / IEC 燈標準內的任何物質條款。請就任何燈型物質限值向 SLSI 確認；不應假設須要歐盟等效的 10 項物質 RoHS 檢測。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical / SVHC Supply-Chain Notification — No REACH-Equivalent in Sri Lanka
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品 / SVHC 供应链通报——斯里兰卡无 REACH 等效制度
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品 / SVHC 供應鏈通報——斯里蘭卡無 REACH 等效制度

summary.en: Sri Lanka has no REACH-equivalent obligation requiring suppliers to proactively notify business customers or consumers when an article contains a Substance of Very High Concern (SVHC) above a 0.1% w/w threshold, and there is no Sri Lankan SVHC candidate list or SCIP-style database. General chemical management is handled through the National Environmental Act (administered by the Central Environmental Authority) and import controls on listed hazardous chemicals, but these do not create an EU REACH Article 33-style article-level SVHC communication duty for LED luminaires. Manufacturers should not expect to file SVHC notifications for Sri Lanka, but should retain general material-safety and substance documentation that the in-country importer or authorities may request, and confirm that no listed hazardous chemical triggers a separate import control.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡没有 REACH 等效义务，即不要求供应商在物品中高度关注物质（SVHC）超过 0.1%（质量分数）阈值时主动通报商业客户或消费者，也不存在斯里兰卡 SVHC 候选清单或 SCIP 式数据库。一般化学品管理通过《国家环境法》（由环境中央局管理）及对列明危险化学品的进口管制处理，但这些不会为 LED 灯具产生欧盟 REACH 第 33 条式的物品级 SVHC 通报义务。制造商不应预期须为斯里兰卡提交 SVHC 通报，但应保留在地进口商或主管机构可能索取的一般材料安全及物质文件，并确认无列明危险化学品触发单独的进口管制。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡沒有 REACH 等效義務，即不要求供應商在物品中高度關注物質（SVHC）超過 0.1%（質量分數）閾值時主動通報商業客戶或消費者，也不存在斯里蘭卡 SVHC 候選清單或 SCIP 式數據庫。一般化學品管理通過《國家環境法》（由環境中央局管理）及對列明危險化學品的進口管制處理，但這些不會為 LED 燈具產生歐盟 REACH 第 33 條式的物品級 SVHC 通報義務。製造商不應預期須為斯里蘭卡提交 SVHC 通報，但應保留在地進口商或主管機構可能索取的一般材料安全及物質文件，並確認無列明危險化學品觸發單獨的進口管制。

standards_or_laws: No Sri Lankan REACH-equivalent SVHC supply-chain notification obligation; no Sri Lankan SVHC candidate list or SCIP-style database
National Environmental Act (Central Environmental Authority, CEA) — general chemicals and hazardous-substance framework; import controls on listed hazardous chemicals

summary.en: China also has no direct equivalent of the REACH Article 33 article-level SVHC notification duty. The closest Chinese instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (2020, Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) for new chemical substance registration and GB 30981-2020 (rules for classification and labelling of chemicals). None of these create a proactive B2B/consumer SVHC communication obligation when an SVHC is present in an article above 0.1% w/w.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有直接对应 REACH 第 33 条物品级 SVHC 通报义务的制度。最接近的中国工具为生态环境部令第 12 号（2020 年，《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》）用于新化学物质登记，及 GB 30981-2020（化学品分类和标签规则）。上述均未在物品中 SVHC 浓度超过 0.1%（质量分数）时产生主动 B2B/消费者通报义务。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有直接對應 REACH 第 33 條物品級 SVHC 通報義務的制度。最接近的中國工具為生態環境部令第 12 號（2020 年，《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》）用於新化學物質登記，及 GB 30981-2020（化學品分類和標籤規則）。上述均未在物品中 SVHC 濃度超過 0.1%（質量分數）時產生主動 B2B/消費者通報義務。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 (2020) — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China)
GB 30981-2020 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China)

gap.en: Both Sri Lanka and China lack a REACH Article 33-equivalent article-level SVHC communication duty, so this is an area where neither market imposes the EU-specific ongoing supply-chain notification obligation. For a Chinese exporter the practical takeaway is simple: there is no SVHC candidate-list screening, 45-day notification, or SCIP-style database registration required for the Sri Lankan market. The only residual considerations are (1) general chemical/hazardous-substance import controls under the National Environmental Act / CEA, which apply to listed chemicals rather than to LED luminaires as articles, and (2) retaining material documentation the in-country importer may request. No EU REACH process transfers to Sri Lanka.
gap.zh: 斯里兰卡与中国均无 REACH 第 33 条等效的物品级 SVHC 通报义务，因此两地均不施加欧盟特有的持续供应链通报义务。对中国出口商的实际要点很简单：斯里兰卡市场不要求 SVHC 候选清单筛查、45 天通报或 SCIP 式数据库注册。仅有的残余考量为：（1）《国家环境法》/ CEA 下的一般化学品/危险物质进口管制，适用于列明化学品而非作为物品的 LED 灯具；（2）保留在地进口商可能索取的材料文件。欧盟 REACH 流程不转移至斯里兰卡。
gap.zht: 斯里蘭卡與中國均無 REACH 第 33 條等效的物品級 SVHC 通報義務，因此兩地均不施加歐盟特有的持續供應鏈通報義務。對中國出口商的實際要點很簡單：斯里蘭卡市場不要求 SVHC 候選清單篩查、45 天通報或 SCIP 式數據庫注冊。僅有的殘餘考量為：（1）《國家環境法》/ CEA 下的一般化學品/危險物質進口管制，適用於列明化學品而非作為物品的 LED 燈具；（2）保留在地進口商可能索取的材料文件。歐盟 REACH 流程不轉移至斯里蘭卡。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Sri Lanka has no REACH Article 33-style SVHC supply-chain notification duty and no SVHC candidate list / SCIP-style database for LED luminaires; only general chemical import controls under the National Environmental Act / CEA may apply
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no REACH Article 33-style article-level SVHC supply-chain notification obligation as of 2026

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Sri Lanka has no REACH-equivalent SVHC supply-chain notification obligation and no SVHC candidate list or SCIP-style database — and China likewise has no Article 33-style article-level duty. For the Sri Lankan market there is no SVHC screening, 45-day notification, or database registration to perform. Only general chemical import controls under the National Environmental Act / CEA may apply to listed chemicals. No EU REACH process transfers to Sri Lanka.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡没有 REACH 等效的 SVHC 供应链通报义务，也没有 SVHC 候选清单或 SCIP 式数据库——中国同样没有第 33 条式的物品级义务。对斯里兰卡市场而言，无须进行 SVHC 筛查、45 天通报或数据库注册。仅《国家环境法》/ CEA 下的一般化学品进口管制可能适用于列明化学品。欧盟 REACH 流程不转移至斯里兰卡。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡沒有 REACH 等效的 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務，也沒有 SVHC 候選清單或 SCIP 式數據庫——中國同樣沒有第 33 條式的物品級義務。對斯里蘭卡市場而言，無須進行 SVHC 篩查、45 天通報或數據庫注冊。僅《國家環境法》/ CEA 下的一般化學品進口管制可能適用於列明化學品。歐盟 REACH 流程不轉移至斯里蘭卡。

requirement_topic.en: SLSI Mandatory Certification, Import Inspection and In-Country Importer vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: SLSI 强制认证、进口检验及在地进口商 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: SLSI 強制認證、進口檢驗及在地進口商 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Market access for regulated LED lamps and luminaires in Sri Lanka centres on the Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI). SLSI operates mandatory product certification and import inspection schemes for products placed under compulsory standardisation, with the SLS mark applied on conformity. The typical pathway is: (1) the product is certified or registered against the applicable SLS standard (which adopts the relevant IEC standard); (2) imported consignments are subject to SLSI import inspection at the point of entry; (3) an in-country importer of record clears customs through Sri Lanka Customs (port of Colombo) and holds the SLSI registration / responsibility. For smart luminaires with radio functionality, TRCSL approval is also required. Manufacturers should confirm with SLSI whether the specific lamp/luminaire category is within the compulsory certification / import-inspection scope, since that scope is defined and updated by SLSI and the relevant ministry.
summary.zh: 斯里兰卡受管制 LED 灯及灯具的市场准入以斯里兰卡标准局（SLSI）为核心。SLSI 对纳入强制标准化的产品实施强制性产品认证及进口检验方案，合格后加贴 SLS 标志。典型路径为：（1）产品按适用 SLS 标准（采用相关 IEC 标准）认证或注册；（2）进口货物在入境口岸接受 SLSI 进口检验；（3）由在地登记进口商经斯里兰卡海关（科伦坡港）清关并持有 SLSI 注册/责任。对于具无线电功能的智能灯具，还须取得 TRCSL 核准。制造商应向 SLSI 确认具体灯/灯具类别是否在强制认证/进口检验范围内，因为该范围由 SLSI 及相关部委界定并更新。
summary.zht: 斯里蘭卡受管制 LED 燈及燈具的市場准入以斯里蘭卡標準局（SLSI）為核心。SLSI 對納入強制標準化的產品實施強制性產品認證及進口檢驗方案，合格後加貼 SLS 標誌。典型路徑為：（1）產品按適用 SLS 標準（採用相關 IEC 標準）認證或注冊；（2）進口貨物在入境口岸接受 SLSI 進口檢驗；（3）由在地登記進口商經斯里蘭卡海關（科倫坡港）清關並持有 SLSI 注冊/責任。對於具無線電功能的智能燈具，還須取得 TRCSL 核准。製造商應向 SLSI 確認具體燈/燈具類別是否在強制認證/進口檢驗範圍內，因為該範圍由 SLSI 及相關部委界定並更新。

standards_or_laws: Sri Lanka Standards Institution (SLSI) — mandatory product certification / import inspection scheme and SLS mark
SLS standards adopting the relevant IEC lamp / luminaire standards (IEC 60598, IEC 62560) as the certification basis
Sri Lanka Customs — import clearance via the in-country importer (port of Colombo); TRCSL approval for radio-enabled luminaires

summary.en: In China, the primary mandatory certification for residential luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA and certified by CNCA-authorised bodies such as CQC. CCC requires mandatory third-party certification and factory inspection. Voluntary CQC certification covers products outside mandatory CCC scope. For wireless-enabled luminaires, SRRC type approval is additionally required. CCC and CQC are recognised only for the Chinese market.
summary.zh: 在中国，居民灯具的主要强制认证为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理并由 CQC 等 CNCA 授权机构认证。CCC 要求强制性第三方认证及工厂检查。自愿性 CQC 认证覆盖强制 CCC 范围外的产品。对于无线灯具，还须取得 SRRC 型号核准。CCC 与 CQC 仅在中国市场获认可。
summary.zht: 在中國，居民燈具的主要強制認證為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理並由 CQC 等 CNCA 授權機構認證。CCC 要求強制性第三方認證及工廠檢查。自願性 CQC 認證覆蓋強制 CCC 範圍外的產品。對於無線燈具，還須取得 SRRC 型號核准。CCC 與 CQC 僅在中國市場獲認可。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C10-01 — CCC certification rules for luminaires (CNCA / CQC)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: SLSI mandatory certification + import inspection (Sri Lanka) versus mandatory third-party CCC (China) are parallel, non-mutual schemes: a Chinese CCC certificate does not satisfy the SLSI pathway and vice versa. Key Sri Lanka-specific points with no direct CN counterpart: (1) consignment-level SLSI import inspection at the point of entry, in addition to product certification — a step the CN domestic CCC model does not impose on the manufacturer; (2) an in-country importer of record is required to clear customs (port of Colombo) and to hold/handle the SLSI registration — there is no concept identical to this in the CN domestic process, and it functions somewhat like the EU's authorised-representative role but is structured around the importer; (3) certification is against the SLS standard adopting the relevant IEC base (IEC 60598 / 62560), so test evidence should map to that IEC base rather than to GB; (4) smart luminaires need TRCSL approval separately. Manufacturers must arrange the in-country importer relationship early and confirm the compulsory scope for the specific category with SLSI.
gap.zh: SLSI 强制认证 + 进口检验（斯里兰卡）与强制第三方 CCC（中国）为并行、非互认方案：中国 CCC 证书不满足 SLSI 路径，反之亦然。斯里兰卡特有、无中国直接对应的要点：（1）在产品认证之外，入境口岸的货物级 SLSI 进口检验——中国国内 CCC 模式不对制造商施加此步骤；（2）须由在地登记进口商清关（科伦坡港）并持有/处理 SLSI 注册——中国国内流程无完全相同的概念，其作用与欧盟授权代表角色有几分相似，但围绕进口商构建；（3）认证依据采用相关 IEC 基础（IEC 60598 / 62560）的 SLS 标准，故检测证据应对应该 IEC 基础而非 GB；（4）智能灯具须单独取得 TRCSL 核准。制造商须尽早安排在地进口商关系，并就具体类别向 SLSI 确认强制范围。
gap.zht: SLSI 強制認證 + 進口檢驗（斯里蘭卡）與強制第三方 CCC（中國）為並行、非互認方案：中國 CCC 證書不滿足 SLSI 路徑，反之亦然。斯里蘭卡特有、無中國直接對應的要點：（1）在產品認證之外，入境口岸的貨物級 SLSI 進口檢驗——中國國內 CCC 模式不對製造商施加此步驟；（2）須由在地登記進口商清關（科倫坡港）並持有/處理 SLSI 注冊——中國國內流程無完全相同的概念，其作用與歐盟授權代表角色有幾分相似，但圍繞進口商構建；（3）認證依據採用相關 IEC 基礎（IEC 60598 / 62560）的 SLS 標準，故檢測證據應對應該 IEC 基礎而非 GB；（4）智能燈具須單獨取得 TRCSL 核准。製造商須盡早安排在地進口商關係，並就具體類別向 SLSI 確認強制範圍。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (scope-dependent) — SLSI product certification and import inspection required for regulated lamps/luminaires before market placement, with the SLS mark; an in-country importer of record handles customs (Colombo) and SLSI registration; TRCSL approval additionally required for radio-enabled luminaires. Confirm compulsory scope with SLSI
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification required for residential luminaires under CNCA-C10-01; SRRC type approval additionally required for wireless-enabled luminaires

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Market access in Sri Lanka runs through SLSI mandatory certification + consignment import inspection and the SLS mark, with an in-country importer of record handling customs (port of Colombo) and the SLSI registration; smart luminaires also need TRCSL approval. SLSI and China's CCC are parallel, non-mutual schemes — a CCC certificate does not satisfy SLSI. Certification is against the SLS standard adopting the relevant IEC base (IEC 60598 / 62560), so map test evidence to that IEC base, not GB. Arrange the in-country importer early and confirm the compulsory scope for the specific category with SLSI.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 斯里兰卡的市场准入通过 SLSI 强制认证 + 货物进口检验及 SLS 标志运作，由在地登记进口商处理清关（科伦坡港）及 SLSI 注册；智能灯具还须 TRCSL 核准。SLSI 与中国 CCC 为并行、非互认方案——CCC 证书不满足 SLSI。认证依据采用相关 IEC 基础（IEC 60598 / 62560）的 SLS 标准，故检测证据应对应该 IEC 基础而非 GB。请尽早安排在地进口商，并就具体类别向 SLSI 确认强制范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 斯里蘭卡的市場准入通過 SLSI 強制認證 + 貨物進口檢驗及 SLS 標誌運作，由在地登記進口商處理清關（科倫坡港）及 SLSI 注冊；智能燈具還須 TRCSL 核准。SLSI 與中國 CCC 為並行、非互認方案——CCC 證書不滿足 SLSI。認證依據採用相關 IEC 基礎（IEC 60598 / 62560）的 SLS 標準，故檢測證據應對應該 IEC 基礎而非 GB。請盡早安排在地進口商，並就具體類別向 SLSI 確認強制範圍。
